ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the survey (e.g., social issues, political opinions) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey topic */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the survey was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the survey (e.g., active, closed, draft) */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the survey was closed */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the survey */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the survey */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the survey was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey to which the response belongs */,
  "importance_extremely" REAL /* Percentage of respondents who rated the topic as extremely important */,
  "importance_somewhat" REAL /* Percentage of respondents who rated the topic as somewhat important */,
  "importance_not_very" REAL /* Percentage of respondents who rated the topic as not very important */,
  "importance_not_at_all" REAL /* Percentage of respondents who rated the topic as not at all important */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was submitted */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the category */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the category was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the category */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Category of the survey (e.g., social issues, political opinions)
Status of the survey (e.g., active, closed, draft)
User who last updated the survey
Date the survey was last updated
ID of the survey to which the response belongs

Date the category was last updated

Date and time of the user's last login
